description: Hero state after defeating MT10 boss (skeletonCaptain), before collecting any MT10 post-boss items
notes: MT10 remaining uncollected items: 3x redGem(x1-3y3), 3x blueGem(x9-11y3), 3x bluePotion(x1-3y4), 3x yellowKey(x9-11y4)
MT10 stairs: downFloor x1y11 -> MT9, upFloor x6y11 -> MT11
Thief event at x6y9 triggers after boss flag, opens path to upFloor
